steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says robots are designed so people find it easier to interact with them. The blank describes what bipedal features do to people's comfort — the word must mean 'strengthen' or 'support.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — mitigate: means to reduce — the opposite of what the passage needs. ✗
  • Choice B — constrict: means to limit — still contradicts the goal of easier interaction. ✗
  • Choice C — repudiate: means to refuse or dismiss — directly opposes the idea of supporting comfort. ✗
  • Choice D — buttress: means to support or strengthen — bipedal features reinforce people's comfort, making interaction easier. ✓
That matches Choice D — buttress.
